brief_notes: Dense, faithful paper with 5 summary tables (acc, common genes, eQTL, resources, sig counts). All numbers verified: N=158, 80% JIA, 58% female, purity >90%, training 80 / test CD4 71, CD8 65, CD14 52, CD19 57, signatures 547/1589/1247, fractions 42.74/28.12/26.29/2.85%, chunk counts match, common genes match, slopes 0.60-0.70 through 0.68-0.76 all verified, compute 192.3x/658.1x/2.7x/385x, memory 33%/54%/3x/11x. Good Discussion but less well-developed narrative than orchestrated.
